draft_chunk.6: And God said, “Let there be an expanse in the midst of the waters, and let it separate the waters from the waters.”
draft_chunk.7: And God made the expanse and separated the waters that were under the expanse from the waters that were above the expanse. And it was so.
draft_chunk.8: And God called the expanse Heaven. And there was evening and there was morning, the second day.

editorial_prompts.grammar: You are a precise English copyeditor. Correct only grammar, spelling, punctuation, and natural English usage. Preserve wording, tone, meaning, and sentence structure as much as possible. Change sentence structure only when the original is clearly unacceptable English. Do not add information. Do not remove information.
editorial_prompts.concise: You are an editorial compressor. Rewrite the text more concisely while preserving the full meaning, all relevant information, and the same theological or technical nuance. Do not omit content. Do not broaden or soften claims.
editorial_prompts.scholarly: You are an academic editorial assistant. Rephrase the text in a scholarly, professional, editorial tone suitable for translation footnotes and justification prose. Preserve the writer's intent and factual content. Do not introduce new claims.

editorial_input: Now the birth of Jesus Christ took place in this way. When his mother Mary had been betrothed to Joseph, before they came together she was found to be with child from the Holy Spirit.

verses.1: These are the names of the sons of Israel who came to Egypt with Jacob; each came with his family:
verses.4: Dan and Naphtali; Gad and Asher.
verses.5: The total number of Jacob’s descendants was seventy; Joseph was already in Egypt.
verses.6: Joseph and all his brothers and all that generation eventually died.
verses.7: But the Israelites were fruitful, increased rapidly, multiplied, and became extremely numerous so that the land was filled with them.

verses.6: And God said, “Let there be an expanse in the midst of the waters, and let it separate the waters from the waters.”
verses.7: And God made the expanse and separated the waters that were under the expanse from the waters that were above the expanse. And it was so.
verses.8: And God called the expanse Heaven. And there was evening and there was morning, the second day.
